reviews.comment:
Llene el tanque con nafta premium y no me quisieron hacer factura A porque pague con la aplicación YPF

(Translated by Google)
I filled the tank with premium gasoline and they refused to give me an invoice because I paid with the YPF app.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/422157531741884596/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURXeE5MelV3EAE

reviews.comment:
Malisima la atencion  lerdos los playeros les hablas y no te prestan atencion y al rato te preguntan lo que uno ya les dijo. Encima le avisamos que ibamos a pagar con la app ypf y cuando le pedimos la factura nos dijo que pagando con la app no emitian factura. Hace desde que comenzo la app que pagamos con ese medio de pago, viajamos por todo el pais y nunca nos paso que nos negaran la factura por abonar con la app. Obvio que ya esta hecha la denuncia en ypf y en Afip. Si pueden evitarlo no carguen en esa estacion son un desastre. Y mala gente
.

(Translated by Google)
The service was terrible. The attendants were slow; you speak to them and they don't pay attention, and then they ask you the same thing you already told them. On top of that, we told them we were going to pay with the YPF app, and when we asked for a receipt, they said they don't issue receipts for app payments. We've been paying with the app since it started, we've traveled all over the country, and we've never been denied a receipt for paying with the app. Of course, we've already filed a complaint with YPF and the tax authority (AFIP). If you can avoid it, don't fill up at that station; they're a disaster. And they're bad people.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/422157531741884596/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURXdUpYdzNnRRAB
